series_metadata.series_title: Public Auction and Municipal Sales Records
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains documents relating to Public Auctions and Municipal Sales. Documents in this series may include, but are not limited to the following: Equipment listings, Reconciliation documents, Copies of receipts, Bid sheets, C.T.''''''''s, Computer records of sale, Bid cards, Sale receipts, AU-64''''''''s, etc. Paper copies are no longer kept. Records kept electronically on X Drive: X:\PM1\Auctions.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain electronically on X: Drive for a period of four years after sale date, then delete., Electronic: Delete
